meta.title: Jabugo Bodega | Iberian Products in Granada
meta.description: An Iberian-focused bodega on Calle Socrates 13, Granada, with a mobile-first approach and premium product experience.

sections.title: An Iberian-specialist bodega
paragraphs: Jabugo Bodega is located in Barrio de Ronda and stands apart from the mass tapas model with a niche proposal.
Its human scale and intimate atmosphere support an experience focused on quality, exclusivity, and close service.

quote.text: Knowledge of the product is as important as the product itself.
quote.author: Nicolás

sections.title: Cinco Jotas and hand slicing
paragraphs: The leading product is 100% Iberian acorn-fed Cinco Jotas ham, served hand-sliced.
The offering is deliberately focused to guarantee exceptional quality in every service.

quote.text: The website should invite guests to an Iberian experience with its own identity.
quote.author: Nicolás
